metadata.description: Portable Agent Skills that bump a Maven or Gradle project one Java LTS step (8->11, 11->17, 17->21, 21->25), conserving previously-passing tests, using only standard tools. A detect-java-version router reads the real bytecode target and dispatches to the right per-hop skill.

plugins.name: bump-java-version
plugins.description: Detect a project's real Java level and migrate it one Java LTS step (8->11, 11->17, 17->21, 21->25) so it compiles under the new JDK and previously-passing tests still pass -- JDKs, Maven or Gradle, and OpenRewrite recipes from Maven Central only; no project-specific scripts.
